description: Edge cases for empty and zero-dimension elements: empty div, display:none, empty p/span, whitespace-only, empty table
visual_assertions: The plain empty div should take up no visible space (no background or border)
The empty div with width/height and background-color should appear as a solid blue rectangle
The zero-width element should show only a thin red vertical line (the border-left)
The zero-height element should show only a thin green horizontal line (the border-top)
The display:none element 'THIS SHOULD NOT BE VISIBLE' must not appear in the PDF
The three display:none hidden elements must all be absent from the output
The 'Mixed visible and hidden' row should show 3 colored boxes (blue, green, purple) with 2 gaps where hidden elements would be
